name: Seigaiha
description: Wave crests bobbing over an indigo sea, after the traditional seigaiha motif — each crest rides at its own height per seed.

code.style: --crest1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --crest2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3)); --cy1: @rand(20%, 55%); --cy2: @rand(45%, 80%); --rule: ( --cs1: @r(70, 95); --cs2: @r(40, 60); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: calc(@var(--cs1) * 1%); left: calc(50% - @var(--cs1) * 0.5%); top: var(--cy1); border: calc(30px / @Y) solid var(--crest1); border-radius: 50%; clip-path: inset(0 0 52% 0); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: calc(@var(--cs2) * 1%); left: calc(50% - @var(--cs2) * 0.5%); top: var(--cy2); border: calc(22px / @Y) solid var(--crest2); border-radius: 50%; clip-path: inset(0 0 52% 0); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
